creator: emartin@snowbound.com
text:
On 1/10/14, 6:29 PM, Ryan Steinmetz wrote:
> I am assuming that you have nscd running.  Can you kill it and try
> again?
>
> Thanks,
> -r
nscd isn't running on either server:

emartin 65312   0.0  0.0 16312 2012  0  S+    9:47PM   0:00.01 grep nscd

[emartin@ur01 ~]$
